appliedUpdates.description: Documented TypeScript testing approach: bun:test is used for all TypeScript tests, run with 'bun test'
Documented TypeScript quantization accuracy thresholds: 4-bit achieves >99% SNR, 8-bit >99.5% accuracy, KV keys ~0.98 cos_sim, KV values ~0.90 cos_sim
Documented NF4 quantization levels used in TypeScript implementation (matching bitsandbytes reference)
